hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user that owns the activity.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version Number

hasAttributes.name: socialProfileId
hasAttributes.description: Unique Identifier of the social profile name.

hasAttributes.name: profileName
hasAttributes.description: Shows the name of the social profile on the corresponding social channel.

hasAttributes.name: profileFullName
hasAttributes.description: Shows the display name of the customer on this social profile.

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the Social Profile

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the Social Profile

hasAttributes.name: customerId
hasAttributes.description: The customer account or contact to provide a quick link to additional customer details, such as account information, activities, and opportunities.

hasAttributes.name: customerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of customer, either Account or Contact.

hasAttributes.name: blocked
hasAttributes.description: Identifies if the social profile has been blocked.

hasAttributes.name: community
hasAttributes.description: Identifies where the social profile originated from, such as Twitter, or Facebook.

hasAttributes.name: influenceScore
hasAttributes.description: Shows the score that determines the online social influence of the social profile.

hasAttributes.name: profileLink
hasAttributes.description: Shows the customer that this social profile belongs to.

hasAttributes.name: uniqueProfileID
hasAttributes.description: Unique ID of the Profile ID

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the conversion rate of the record's currency. The exchange rate is used to convert all money fields in the record from the local currency to the system's default currency.

definitions.description: This entity is used to store social profile information of its associated account and contacts on different social channels.
